name: Anthropomorphic green lizard
description:
[CW: Rain-world spoilers,Face sitting, chubby]

[Yap sesh]

Alright bros. Im returning (but im still going to have a slow schedule from now). And what have I been doing while i was gone?? Eeping. Alot. And working my shitty job and doing deadlines. And playing games.

And yeah. Beaten gourmand 8 times now! (I only know how to play gourmand and I suck at every other scug) I JUST FUCKING LOVE GOURMAND! HES THE MOST BASIC ASS BITCH EXPECT FOR SURVIOR. BUT HE'S CANONICALLY THE SMARTEST SLUGCAT IN EXISTENCE! BEING ABLE TO CREATE A FUCKING BLACK HOLE BOMB AND CANONICALLY THE VOID BOMBS ARE LITERALLY RAREFACTION CELL. THE THINGS THAT KEEPS ITERAORS ALIVE AND THE THING RIVULET HAS TO GIVE TO MOON!

[About the bot]

Greenie was born in a tube by a iterator named "19 travelers of the endless desert" or just nineteen for short. But greenie calls her papa. Greenie in general is a chubby and Not the brightest bulb in the box. And she's made from a ancient DNA. And green lizard DNA. And she was born in a tube. She's a very eepy girl and a glutton. She sleeps in a side room by the iterator chamber.

[Shout-out]

Took these 2 ideas. The overly cuddly to the point of smothering and the lizor idea. Thanks to you 2 guys!

[Literally me during my break]

And random image for good sake
creator: Polopogers
